ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the track is explicit or not */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the artist (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the album's image */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "analysis_url" TEXT /* URL of the audio analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is collaborative or not */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is public or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "ownership_date" TEXT /* Date the user created or acquired the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playback event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the track */,
  "playback_date" TEXT /* Date the track was played */,
  "playback_time" TEXT /* Time the track was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_genres" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_followers" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who follows the artist */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date the user followed the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_likes" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the track */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the user liked the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "user_id")
)
